global.description: The ad features a clean design with a focus on the brand and its message.
global.main_message: Promoting transparency in financial services with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Green gradient background
elements.description: A smooth green gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: VaultRun logo
elements.description: The logo 'VaultRun' appears prominently at the top in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: The text 'Your money, clearer' is displayed in a large, clear font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: The phrase 'No hidden fees' is presented below the headline in a smaller font, maintaining clarity.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Learn more' at the bottom, inviting user interaction.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: Abstract geometric shapes in lighter shades of green are subtly integrated into the background.

elements.label: Small icon
elements.description: A small icon located at the top left, possibly decorative or functional.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: An oval shape in the center, adding visual interest without specific context.

elements.label: Secondary message
elements.description: The text 'Your money, clearer No hidden fees' is bold and clear, emphasizing the ad's message.
elements.text_content: Your money, clearer No hidden fees

elements.label: VaultRun branding
elements.description: The brand name 'VaultRun' is prominently displayed at the top in a modern, bold font.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A simple, rounded button at the bottom with the text 'Learn more', encouraging user engagement.
